---
title: "Pokemon Battle"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Press+Start+2P&display=swap');
  #pb { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; padding: 1rem 0; }
  .pb-arena { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .pb-card { background: #f5f5f5; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; text-align: center; }
  .pb-name { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 4px; text-transform: capitalize; }
  .pb-lv { font-size: 9px; color: #888; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .pb-sprite { width: 80px; height: 80px; image-rendering: pixelated; }
  .pb-hpbar-wrap { background: #ddd; border-radius: 4px; height: 8px; margin: 6px 0; overflow: hidden; }
  .pb-hpbar { height: 100%; border-radius: 4px; transition: width 0.4s, background 0.4s; }
  .pb-hptext { font-size: 9px; color: #888; }
  .pb-log { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 10px; min-height: 40px; margin-bottom: 14px; line-height: 1.8; }
  .pb-moves { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .pb-move { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px; font-size: 9px; cursor: pointer; text-transform: capitalize; transition: background 0.15s; text-align: left; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; }
  .pb-move:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #f0f0f0; }
  .pb-move:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }
  .pb-move-name { font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 3px; }
  .pb-move-meta { color: #888; font-size: 8px; }
  .pb-type { display: inline-block; border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 5px; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .pb-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
  .pb-btn { flex: 1; padding: 8px; font-size: 9px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ccc; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; }
  .pb-btn:hover { background: #f0f0f0; }
  .pb-shake { animation: shake 0.3s; }
  @keyframes shake { 0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)} 25%{transform:translateX(-6px)} 75%{transform:translateX(6px)} }
  .pb-faint { opacity: 0.3; transition: opacity 0.5s; }
  .pb-status { font-size: 9px; color: #888; margin-top: 2px; min-height: 12px; }
</style>

<div id="pb">
  <div id="pb-loading" style="text-align:center;padding:2rem;font-size:11px;color:#888;">Loading Pokemon...</div>
  <div id="pb-game" style="display:none">
    <div class="pb-arena">
      <div class="pb-card">
        <div class="pb-name" id="p-name">-</div>
        <div class="pb-lv">Your Pokemon &bull; Lv.50</div>
        <img class="pb-sprite" id="p-sprite" src="" alt="Your Pokemon"/>
        <div class="pb-type" id="p-type"></div>
        <div class="pb-hpbar-wrap"><div class="pb-hpbar" id="p-hpbar" style="width:100%;background:#4CAF50"></div></div>
        <div class="pb-hptext" id="p-hptext"></div>
        <div class="pb-status" id="p-status"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="pb-card">
        <div class="pb-name" id="e-name">-</div>
        <div class="pb-lv">Wild Pokemon &bull; Lv.50</div>
        <img class="pb-sprite" id="e-sprite" src="" alt="Enemy Pokemon"/>
        <div class="pb-type" id="e-type"></div>
        <div class="pb-hpbar-wrap"><div class="pb-hpbar" id="e-hpbar" style="width:100%;background:#4CAF50"></div></div>
        <div class="pb-hptext" id="e-hptext"></div>
        <div class="pb-status" id="e-status"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pb-log" id="pb-log">What will you do?</div>
    <div class="pb-moves" id="pb-moves"></div>
    <div class="pb-actions">
      <button class="pb-btn" id="btn-heal" onclick="useItem()">Use Potion</button>
      <button class="pb-btn" onclick="newBattle()">New battle</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const typeColors = {fire:'#F08030',water:'#6890F0',grass:'#78C850',electric:'#F8D030',psychic:'#F85888',ice:'#98D8D8',dragon:'#7038F8',dark:'#705848',fairy:'#EE99AC',normal:'#A8A878',fighting:'#C03028',poison:'#A040A0',ground:'#E0C068',flying:'#A890F0',bug:'#A8B820',rock:'#B8A038',ghost:'#705898',steel:'#B8B8D0'};

let player = {}, enemy = {}, potions = 3, busy = false;

async function fetchPokemon(id) {
  const r = await fetch('https://pokeapi.co/api/v2/pokemon/' + id);
  const d = await r.json();
  const moves = d.moves.filter(m => m.version_group_details.some(v => v.move_learn_method.name === 'level-up' && v.level_learned_at <= 50)).slice(0, 4);
  const moveData = await Promise.all(moves.map(async m => {
    const mr = await fetch(m.move.url);
    const md = await mr.json();
    return { name: md.name, power: md.power || 40, accuracy: md.accuracy || 100, type: md.type.name, pp: md.pp || 10, maxPP: md.pp || 10 };
  }));
  const baseHP = d.stats.find(s => s.stat.name === 'hp').base_stat;
  const maxHP = Math.floor(baseHP * 1.5 + 50);
  return {
    name: d.name, id: d.id,
    sprite: d.sprites.front_default,
    backSprite: d.sprites.back_default || d.sprites.front_default,
    type: d.types[0].type.name,
    maxHP, hp: maxHP,
    moves: moveData.length >= 2 ? moveData : [
      { name: 'tackle', power: 40, accuracy: 100, type: 'normal', pp: 35, maxPP: 35 },
      { name: 'scratch', power: 40, accuracy: 100, type: 'normal', pp: 35, maxPP: 35 }
    ]
  };
}

async function newBattle() {
  document.getElementById('pb-loading').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('pb-game').style.display = 'none';
  busy = true; potions = 3;
  const pid = Math.floor(Math.random() * 151) + 1;
  const eid = Math.floor(Math.random() * 151) + 1;
  [player, enemy] = await Promise.all([fetchPokemon(pid), fetchPokemon(eid)]);
  player.sprite = player.backSprite;
  renderPokemon();
  renderMoves();
  updateHP('p'); updateHP('e');
  document.getElementById('pb-log').textContent = 'A wild ' + cap(enemy.name) + ' appeared!';
  document.getElementById('btn-heal').textContent = 'Potion (' + potions + ')';
  document.getElementById('p-status').textContent = '';
  document.getElementById('e-status').textContent = '';
  document.getElementById('p-sprite').classList.remove('pb-faint');
  document.getElementById('e-sprite').classList.remove('pb-faint');
  document.getElementById('pb-loading').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('pb-game').style.display = 'block';
  busy = false;
}

function renderPokemon() {
  document.getElementById('p-name').textContent = cap(player.name);
  document.getElementById('e-name').textContent = cap(enemy.name);
  document.getElementById('p-sprite').src = player.sprite;
  document.getElementById('e-sprite').src = enemy.sprite;
  setType('p-type', player.type);
  setType('e-type', enemy.type);
}

function setType(id, type) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  el.textContent = type;
  el.style.background = typeColors[type] || '#888';
  el.style.color = '#fff';
}

function renderMoves() {
  const wrap = document.getElementById('pb-moves'); wrap.innerHTML = '';
  player.moves.forEach((m, i) => {
    const b = document.createElement('button');
    b.className = 'pb-move';
    b.onclick = () => useMove(i);
    b.innerHTML = '<div class="pb-move-name">' + cap(m.name) + '</div><div class="pb-move-meta" style="color:' + (typeColors[m.type] || '#888') + '">' + m.type + ' &bull; ' + m.power + ' pwr &bull; PP ' + m.pp + '/' + m.maxPP + '</div>';
    b.id = 'move-' + i;
    wrap.appendChild(b);
  });
}

function updateHP(who) {
  const pk = who === 'p' ? player : enemy;
  const pct = Math.max(0, pk.hp / pk.maxHP * 100);
  const bar = document.getElementById(who + '-hpbar');
  bar.style.width = pct + '%';
  bar.style.background = pct > 50 ? '#4CAF50' : pct > 20 ? '#FFC107' : '#f44336';
  document.getElementById(who + '-hptext').textContent = Math.max(0, pk.hp) + ' / ' + pk.maxHP + ' HP';
}

function setDisabled(v) {
  player.moves.forEach((_, i) => { const b = document.getElementById('move-' + i); if (b) b.disabled = v; });
  document.getElementById('btn-heal').disabled = v;
}

async function useMove(i) {
  if (busy || player.moves[i].pp <= 0) return;
  busy = true; setDisabled(true);
  const m = player.moves[i];
  m.pp--; renderMoves();
  const hit = Math.random() * 100 <= m.accuracy;
  if (!hit) { log(cap(player.name) + ' used ' + cap(m.name) + '... but it missed!'); await wait(700); }
  else {
    const dmg = calcDmg(m);
    enemy.hp = Math.max(0, enemy.hp - dmg);
    updateHP('e'); shake('e-sprite');
    log(cap(player.name) + ' used ' + cap(m.name) + '! ' + cap(enemy.name) + ' took ' + dmg + ' damage!');
    await wait(900);
    if (enemy.hp <= 0) { faint('e-sprite'); log(cap(enemy.name) + ' fainted! You win!'); busy = false; return; }
  }
  await enemyTurn();
  busy = false; setDisabled(false);
}

async function enemyTurn() {
  const avail = enemy.moves.filter(m => m.pp > 0);
  if (!avail.length) { log(cap(enemy.name) + ' has no moves left!'); return; }
  const m = avail[Math.floor(Math.random() * avail.length)];
  m.pp--;
  const hit = Math.random() * 100 <= m.accuracy;
  if (!hit) { log('Wild ' + cap(enemy.name) + ' used ' + cap(m.name) + '... but it missed!'); await wait(700); return; }
  const dmg = calcDmg(m);
  player.hp = Math.max(0, player.hp - dmg);
  updateHP('p'); shake('p-sprite');
  log('Wild ' + cap(enemy.name) + ' used ' + cap(m.name) + '! You took ' + dmg + ' damage!');
  await wait(900);
  if (player.hp <= 0) { faint('p-sprite'); log(cap(player.name) + ' fainted! You lose!'); setDisabled(true); }
}

function calcDmg(move) {
  const base = ((2 * 50 / 5 + 2) * move.power / 50) + 2;
  const rng = 0.85 + Math.random() * 0.15;
  return Math.max(1, Math.floor(base * rng));
}

async function useItem() {
  if (busy || potions <= 0 || player.hp <= 0) return;
  busy = true; setDisabled(true);
  potions--;
  const heal = Math.floor(player.maxHP * 0.4);
  player.hp = Math.min(player.maxHP, player.hp + heal);
  updateHP('p');
  document.getElementById('btn-heal').textContent = 'Potion (' + potions + ')';
  log('You used a Potion! ' + cap(player.name) + ' recovered ' + heal + ' HP!');
  await wait(800);
  await enemyTurn();
  busy = false; setDisabled(false);
}

function log(msg) { document.getElementById('pb-log').textContent = msg; }
function cap(s) { return s.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + s.slice(1); }
function wait(ms) { return new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); }
function shake(id) { const el = document.getElementById(id); el.classList.add('pb-shake'); setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('pb-shake'), 300); }
function faint(id) { document.getElementById(id).classList.add('pb-faint'); }

newBattle();
</script>
```
